data.description:
Followers on LinkedIn, I need to say a few words.

I would like to make a sincere apology for my previous post, advertising an event I am hosting and claiming that I will "literally die" if it doesn't sell out.

The truth is: that was a lie.

This was a heat of the moment lapse of judgement and I am sorry to those hurt by this.

Lying to people in order to make a quick profit is something that goes against my values and something a CEO would never do.

I did what I did for one simple reason alone.

My family has been kidnapped by terrorists and they told me I had to make that post.

It felt horrible though. It was not me.

In the coming months, I am going to seek therapy and practice a lot of self reflection. 

After that, I will be absolved of all sins that "pre-therapy Ken" did because it was a completely different person.

Until then, I'll be taking time away from LinkedIn to spend time trying to find my family.

 | 102 comments on LinkedIn

Followers on LinkedIn, I need to say a few words. I would like to make a sincere apology for my previous post, advertising an event I am hosting and claiming that I will "literally die" if it doesn't sell out. The truth is: that was a lie. This was a heat of the moment lapse of judgement and I am sorry to those hurt by this. Lying to people in order to make a quick profit is something that goes against my values and something a CEO would never do. I did what I did for one simple reason alone. My family has been kidnapped by terrorists and they told me I had to make that post. It felt horrible though. It was not me. In the coming months, I am going to seek therapy and practice a lot of self reflection. After that, I will be absolved of all sins that "pre-therapy Ken" did because it was a completely different person. Until then, I'll be taking time away from LinkedIn to spend time trying to find my family.

Have you done the cost/benefit analysis of finding your family vs just starting a new one? 🤔 You didn't become a successful CEO by wasting resources on sunk cost.

You'd have a greater chance of finding forgiveness for your errors if you uploaded an apology video, playing the ukulele, and wearing white to symbolize your innocence.

I truly hope that the journey to find your family helps you to learn more about B2B sales

London-based freelance…•2K followers

1y

Now think about this. Were your family - hand on heart - really "A-hires", or were they simply the best you could do at the time? Now you're a successful and wealthy CEO it was probably past time you reviewed their tenure anyway, always seeking to optimise. Perhaps the kidnappers did you a favour?

This is where you double down on refusing to negotiate with terrorists, as you can always just start another family.

So let me get this straight— someone has taken your entire family and is paying for their food, shelter, and daily expenses? Beat them at their own game 💰 eventually they’ll pay you for their release. Unlocks CEO Level 3.0

Yes but now this is a deal breaker. I told you not to advertise the fact that I have your family. I don't know man, I have to rethink our terms now.

Feels like you could do with having a very specific set of skills, acquired over a long career, that would make you a nightmare for people like them……. Failing that, cut the family loose…..you can probably find other people to live with and it’s probably less dangerous. 👍
